projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A clean, responsive portfolio built with Express.js and EJS to showcase my journey from beginner to intermediate developer.
projects.longDescription: This is my current portfolio project. It features a modern design, smooth navigation, dark mode, and is fully responsive.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A simple todo application with add, edit, delete, and local storage persistence.
projects.longDescription: Built as my first major JavaScript project. Users can create tasks, mark them complete, and filter by status.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time weather application using a public weather API with search functionality.
projects.longDescription: Fetches current weather and 5-day forecast. Includes location search and beautiful UI with icons.

projects.title: Simple Blog Website
projects.description: A static blog platform with multiple articles and responsive design.
projects.longDescription: Built using only HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript. Features dark mode toggle and article filtering.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
projects.description: Personal finance app to track income and expenses with charts.
projects.longDescription: Allows users to add transactions, categorize them, and view monthly summaries using Chart.js.
